title: Dorry and Brogy’s Pride
description: On pages 5–8, dorry and brogy’s pride as the giants’ proud battle becomes the center of the island as the Straw Hats learn what Elbaf honor means.
scene: Dorry and Brogy’s Pride. The giants’ proud battle becomes the center of the island as the Straw Hats learn what Elbaf honor means. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What's going on!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Can't we stay at least one more night!? Their party was a blast and they have so many cute girls!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Why did we have to set sail so soon!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That's right you have no idea if we'll ever come across a town as nice as that one!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: So let's take things nice and easy! We are pirates, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I mean, the sun hasn't even risen yet!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Come on, let's go back!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: I think you oughta go explain to them what happened...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: consider it done.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: The fog is lifting.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's almost morning.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Be careful not to crash your ship into the rocks near the shore.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Tap tap

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: and Congra- tulations on your escape.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What a nice ship this is.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Who's that!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I must tell you Ms. Wed-nesday,

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: I met up with Mr. 8 just a little while ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you saying...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It was you who did that to IGARAM...!?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Hey! Why're you on our ship anyways!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What're you doing all the way out here,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Miss all- Sunday!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Baroque works vice president (highest ranking officer) MISS ALL-SUNDAY

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who is it this time!? Whose partner is she!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She's Mr. O's partner...!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: She's the only one who knows the boss' true identity,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Which is why IGARAM and I talked after her,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: to find out who the boss was as well!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well technically,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It was more like I let you tail after me.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Oh, so she's a good guy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I already knew that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And I bet you're the one who told the boss that his identity was leaked!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Oh, so she's a bad guy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Just what exactly is your objective!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now, now...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: No need to get so worked up.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: I only let you follow me because you looked so desperate...

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on dorry and brogy’s pride. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
